children.label: A
children.text: are beyond the age of compulsory school attendance in the State in which the institution is located; and

children.label: B
children.text: have the ability to benefit from the training offered by the institution;
that does not provide an educational program for which the institution awards a bachelor’s degree or an equivalent degree; and

children.label: A
children.text: provides an educational program of not less than 2 years that is acceptable for full credit toward such a degree; or

children.label: B
children.text: offers a 2-year program in engineering, technology, mathematics, or the physical, chemical, or biological sciences, designed to prepare a student to work as a technician or at the semiprofessional level in engineering, scientific, or other technological fields requiring the understanding and application of basic engineering, scientific, or mathematical principles of knowledge.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary shall establish a program to be known as the “New Era Rural Technology Program”, to make grants available for technology development, applied research, and training to aid in the development of an agriculture-based renewable energy workforce.

children.label: A
children.text: be a community college or advanced technological center, located in a rural area and in existence on the date of the enactment of this section, that participates in agricultural or bioenergy research and applied research;

children.label: B
children.text: have a proven record of development and implementation of programs to meet the needs of students, educators, and business and industry to supply the agriculture-based, renewable energy or pulp and paper manufacturing fields with certified technicians, as determined by the Secretary; and

children.label: C
children.text: have the ability to leverage existing partnerships and occupational outreach and training programs for secondary schools, 4-year institutions, and relevant nonprofit organizations.
to maximize the ability to meet the requirements of this section.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section such sums as are necessary for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2023.
